goal: r * (p.coeff(m) + q.coeff(m)) = r * p.coeff(m) + r * q.coeff(m)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }[R](r, p.coeff(m), q.coeff(m))
function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0.coeff != x1.coeff or x0 = x1 }[R, M]((p + q).smul(r), p.smul(r) + q.smul(r))

goal: (r + s) * p.coeff(m) = r * p.coeff(m) + s * p.coeff(m)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[R](r, p.coeff(m), s)
function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0.coeff != x1.coeff or x0 = x1 }[R, M](p.smul(r + s), p.smul(r) + p.smul(s))
function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[R](r, s, p.coeff(m))
function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0.coeff != x1.coeff or x0 = x1 }[R, M](p.smul(s).smul(r), p.smul(r * s))

goal: exists(k0: AddMonoidAlgebra[R, M]) { AddMonoidAlgebra.new[R, M](pointwise_neg[M, R](p.coeff)) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { not AddMonoidAlgebra.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { AddMonoidAlgebra.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]](k0) } }[R, M](pointwise_neg[M, R](p.coeff))
function[T0, T1: Semiring](x0: T0 -> T1) { is_finitely_supported[T0, T1](x0) = AddMonoidAlgebra.constraint[T1, T0](x0) }[M, R](pointwise_neg[M, R](p.coeff))
function[T0, T1: Semiring](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T1, T0]) { is_finitely_supported[T0, T1](x0.coeff) }[M, R](p)

function[T0: Ring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { AddMonoidAlgebra.new[T0, T1](pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0.coeff)) = Option.some[AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]](add_monoid_algebra_neg[T0, T1](x0)) }[R, M](p)

function[T0: Ring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { AddMonoidAlgebra.new[T0, T1](pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0.coeff)) = Option.some[AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]](add_monoid_algebra_neg[T0, T1](x0)) }[R, M](p)
let w0: M satisfy { add_monoid_algebra_neg[R, M](p).coeff(w0) != pointwise_neg[M, R](p.coeff, w0) }

function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1) { Option.some[AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]](x0) != AddMonoidAlgebra.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.coeff(x2) = x1(x2) }[R, M](add_monoid_algebra_neg[R, M](p), pointwise_neg[M, R](p.coeff), w0)
function[T0: lib(neg).Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[R, M](p.coeff, m)
function[T0: Ring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R, M](p, q)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[R](p.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { AddMonoidAlgebra.zero[R, M].coeff(w0) != (p + -p).coeff(w0) }
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { -x0 + x0 = T0.0 }[R](p.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { AddMonoidAlgebra.zero[R, M].coeff(w0) != (-p + p).coeff(w0) }
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[R](R.0)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](-R.0)
let w0: M satisfy { AddMonoidAlgebra.zero[R, M].coeff(w0) != (-AddMonoidAlgebra.zero[R, M]).coeff(w0) }
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -x0 + -x1 = -(x1 + x0) }[R](p.coeff(m), q.coeff(m))
function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[R](p.coeff(m), q.coeff(m))
function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0.coeff != x1.coeff or x0 = x1 }[R, M](-(p + q), -p + -q)
function[T0: Ring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R, M](p, p)
function[T0: Ring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R, M](p, AddMonoidAlgebra.zero[R, M])
function[T0: Ring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R, M](AddMonoidAlgebra.zero[R, M], p)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 != x0 + x2 or x1 = x2 }[R](p.coeff(m), r.coeff(m), q.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { q.coeff(w0) != r.coeff(w0) }
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 != x2 + x1 or x0 = x2 }[R](r.coeff(m), p.coeff(m), q.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { q.coeff(w0) != r.coeff(w0) }
function(x0: M) { p.coeff(x0) = R.0 }(m)
let w0: M satisfy { p.coeff(w0) != AddMonoidAlgebra.zero[R, M].coeff(w0) }
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[R](p.coeff(m), -q.coeff(m), q.coeff(m))
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { -x0 + x0 = T0.0 }[R](q.coeff(m))
function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[R](p.coeff(m), R.0)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](p.coeff(m))
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](q.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { p.coeff(w0) != q.coeff(w0) }
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[R](p.coeff(m), -q.coeff(m), q.coeff(m))
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { -x0 + x0 = T0.0 }[R](q.coeff(m))
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[R](p.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { p.coeff(w0) != (p - q + q).coeff(w0) }
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[R](p.coeff(m), q.coeff(m), -q.coeff(m))
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[R](q.coeff(m))
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[R](p.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { p.coeff(w0) != (p + q - q).coeff(w0) }
function[T0: Ring](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -(x0 * x1) = x0 * -x1 }[R](r, p.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { (-p.smul(r)).coeff(w0) != (-p).smul(r).coeff(w0) }
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }[R](r, p.coeff(m), -q.coeff(m))
function[T0: Ring](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -(x0 * x1) = x0 * -x1 }[R](r, q.coeff(m))
function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0.coeff != x1.coeff or x0 = x1 }[R, M](p.smul(r) - q.smul(r), (p - q).smul(r))
function[T0: Ring](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -(x0 * x1) = -x0 * x1 }[R](r, p.coeff(m))
let w0: M satisfy { p.smul(-r).coeff(w0) != (-p.smul(r)).coeff(w0) }
function(x0: M) { (-p.smul(r)).coeff(x0) = p.smul(-r).coeff(x0) }(w0)
-p.smul(r) != (-p).smul(r)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[R](r, p.coeff(m), -s)
function[T0: Ring](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -(x0 * x1) = -x0 * x1 }[R](s, p.coeff(m))
function[T0: Ring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0.coeff(x1) + -x2.coeff(x1) = (x0 - x2).coeff(x1) }[R, M](p.smul(r), m, p.smul(s))
function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]) { x0.coeff != x1.coeff or x0 = x1 }[R, M](p.smul(r) - p.smul(s), p.smul(r + -s))
(p.smul(r) - p.smul(s)).coeff = p.smul(r + -s).coeff
(p.smul(r) - p.smul(s)).coeff != p.smul(r + -s).coeff

function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { Option.some[AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]](add_monoid_algebra_single[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = AddMonoidAlgebra.new[T0, T1](add_monoid_algebra_single_coeff[T0, T1](x0, x1)) }[R, M](m, R.0)
let w0: M satisfy { add_monoid_algebra_single_coeff(m, R.0, w0) != AddMonoidAlgebra.single(m, R.0).coeff(w0) }

function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1], x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1) { Option.some[AddMonoidAlgebra[T0, T1]](x0) != AddMonoidAlgebra.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.coeff(x2) = x1(x2) }[R, M](AddMonoidAlgebra.single(m, R.0), add_monoid_algebra_single_coeff(m, R.0), w0)
function[T0: Semiring, T1](x0: T1, x1: T1, x2: T0) { (if x0 = x1 { x2 } else { T0.0 }) = add_monoid_algebra_single_coeff[T0, T1](x0, x2, x1) }[R, M](m, n, R.0)
let w0: M satisfy { AddMonoidAlgebra.zero[R, M].coeff(w0) != AddMonoidAlgebra.single(m, R.0).coeff(w0) }
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](R.0)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[R](s)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[R](R.0)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R](-R.0)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[R](R.0)
